shots.title: Session landing
shots.alt: MemDiver session landing page, listing previously saved analysis sessions.

shots.title: Wizard — select data
shots.alt: Wizard step one with a path input and a file-browser modal open over the workspace.

shots.title: Wizard — analysis algorithms
shots.alt: Wizard step three showing the eight-algorithm checkbox grid with availability dimming.

shots.title: Workspace — default layout
shots.alt: MemDiver workspace in dark theme showing hex viewer, sidebar with six tabs, detail overlay, and bottom analysis panel.

shots.title: Hex viewer with structure overlay
shots.alt: Hex viewer with a TLS-13 structure overlay highlighting bytes by classification.

shots.title: Entropy profile
shots.alt: Entropy profile chart with Shannon entropy plotted against byte offset and high-entropy regions shaded red.

shots.title: Consensus view
shots.alt: Consensus chart — stacked bars showing per-byte classification counts across N dumps.

shots.title: Pipeline — oracle stage
shots.alt: Pipeline oracle-stage wizard showing an uploaded decryption oracle with dry-run dots.

shots.title: Pipeline — run dashboard
shots.alt: Live pipeline run dashboard with funnel chart, stage-timing table, and live oracle log.

shots.title: Pipeline — results
shots.alt: Pipeline results with survivor curve and downloadable artifacts including a Volatility3 plugin.

shots.title: Theme triptych
shots.alt: Three workspace panels side by side in light, dark, and dark-plus-high-contrast themes.

shots.title: Workspace — MSL loaded (dark)
shots.alt: MemDiver workspace with the canonical MSL fixture loaded into the hex viewer — dark theme.

shots.title: Workspace — MSL loaded (light)
shots.alt: MemDiver workspace with the canonical MSL fixture loaded into the hex viewer — light theme.
